title: sedum dasyphyllum subsp. dasyphyllum
intro: Sedum dasyphyllum subsp. dasyphyllum, also known as the prickly-leaved stonecrop, is a succulent plant species belonging to the Crassulaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to soothe wounds, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic agent. The health benefits of Sedum dasyphyllum subsp. dasyphyllum include its potential to promote skin healing, reduce pain and swelling, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Sedum dasyphyllum subsp. dasyphyllum can be prepared as a tincture, infused oil, or salve, allowing for various herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
